title: Music generation (Lyria)
summary: Generate musical audio from a text prompt with Lyria. Clip returns 30-second MP3; Pro returns full-length MP3 or WAV.
notes: Lyria 3 Clip always returns ~30s MP3. Lyria 3 Pro produces full-length tracks and supports response_mime_type='audio/wav' for lossless output.
The response also carries text parts when the model emits lyrics or section labels — iterate every part and dispatch by type.
Music generation is asset-billed (per-track, with per-second adjustments on Pro). Token cost in the run panel is the prompt only — the bulk of the bill is on the audio asset, see the pricing link.
